profile.summary: HR generalist covering onboarding, employee relations, and HRIS.

jobDescription: Summit Robotics needs a People Operations Partner to run onboarding, handle employee relations cases, maintain BambooHR, and draft practical people policies for a growing hardware team.
cvText:
Taylor Mensah
People Operations Generalist

Experience:
- People Ops at Driftwood Design (2019-2025)
- Ran end-to-end onboarding for ~80 hires
- Handled employee relations cases with managers
- Administered BambooHR and drafted leave policy updates

Skills: onboarding, employee relations, BambooHR, policy drafting
Education: BA Psychology, Southridge University; CIPD Level 5
baselineCoverLetter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am applying for the People Operations Partner role at Summit Robotics. At Driftwood Design I ran onboarding for dozens of hires, supported employee relations, administered BambooHR, and drafted leave policy updates.

I would welcome supporting your growing hardware team with the same practical ops focus.

Sincerely,
Taylor Mensah
